description: Mother-of-pearl thin-film iridescence. A bilateral surface that blooms with proximity and settles back to a subtle shimmer at idle. Derived from the nacre-gate inquiry profile.
aestheticIntent: guarded luminosity — reveals iridescence gradually through proximity, never demanding attention

u_time.description: Elapsed time in seconds. Driver for shimmer animation.

u_pointer.description: Normalised pointer position [0-1, 0-1]. Drives proximity bloom.

u_intensity.description: Overall material intensity. Derived from revealed_concealed axis (1 - position).

u_iridescence.description: Thin-film iridescence strength. Derived from tactile_spectral axis position.

u_shimmerOpacity.description: Idle shimmer opacity. From nacre-effect-shimmer-opacity token.

u_baseColor.description: Base surface RGB (linearised from hsl). Derived from color.surface.0 token.

u_accentColor.description: Accent bloom RGB (linearised). Derived from color.material.orchid token.

failureModes: feels merely decorative if u_intensity is pushed above 0.9 without pointer tracking
becomes precious but unusable if shimmer speed drops below 800ms
unfolding takes too long if bloom base duration exceeds 1200ms
